summary: Iteration 5 acceptance test PASSED for all 6 new features. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases green (diagnosi_secondarie create+update+default-empty; ESSPRI/FIQR/VAS_pain PRO token POST 200; old 'ess_pri' rejected with 400 as expected; public GET unauth + submit + already_submitted + 409 double-submit). Frontend (admin login, real flow): (1) 'patient-diagnosi-secondarie' chips field present in Nuovo paziente form; (2) PatientHeader shows 'Overlap / secondarie:' badges for Fibromialgia+Osteoporosi; (3) 'guidelines-shortcuts' renders RA+FM+OP shortcuts and clicking 'Fibromialgia' navigates to /linee-guida?q=Fibromialgia with the search input auto-filled; (4) PZ-8277E1EE shows 'Linee guida: Artrite Reumatoide' shortcut and ILD-screening alert correctly HIDDEN (raProfile.ild=true documented); (5) Nuova valutazione dropdown lists 'esspri' (NOT old 'ess_pri') AND 'progetto_cuore'; (6) Progetto Cuore form opens with sex/SBP/TC/HDL etc. fields and 4 numeric inputs; (7) SpA Profile shows all 5 flags (Psoriasi, Uveite, IBD, Dattilite, Entesite) — toggling Dattilite+Entesite, save, reload: both persist as data-state=checked; (8) QR per il paziente dialog lists ESSPRI and FIQR options as checkboxes. Cleanup of test patients done in both UI and pytest fixtures.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend stores PRO submission responses VERBATIM (server.py:1150 — public_submit_pro just $set submitted_responses=payload.responses). Scoring for ESSPRI/FIQR therefore happens entirely client-side in /app/frontend/src/lib/proInstruments.js (calcESSPRI / calcFIQR). The score persisted with the assessment (when convert_pro_token is called, server.py:1079) trusts the score the patient's browser computed. If a malicious patient tampers with the public PRO bundle, they can post arbitrary score+inputs. Acceptable for current threat model (link is single-use + short-lived) but worth documenting; a future hardening could re-compute the score server-side from inputs before convert.

PatientUpdate.diagnosi_secondarie is Optional[List[str]] = None (server.py:167). PUT with explicit null would clear the list silently because the patch path only updates non-None fields. Frontend Patients.jsx sends an array (string split by comma), so this is consistent — but the agent_to_agent_context_note warned about Pydantic null rejection: confirmed that a) creating without the field defaults to [] and b) explicit null is not currently sent by the UI. No bug.

FIQR scoring requires nested {function, overall, symptoms} payload but the public form submits flat keys (f_q1..s_environmental_sym). The score function in proInstruments.js:265 correctly maps flat→nested before calling calcFIQR — verified by reading code. (No runtime test executed for the actual numeric output, but the structure is sound.)

All new data-testids are wired correctly: patient-diagnosi-secondarie, diagnosi-secondarie, guidelines-shortcuts, guideline-shortcut-{ra,fm,op}, clinical-alerts, alert-{id}, spa-{psoriasis,uveitis,ibd,dactylitis,enthesitis}-{toggle,checkbox}, new-progetto_cuore, new-esspri. Excellent test surface.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (12/12 UI checks passed across 2 Playwright runs)

seed_data_creation: Two transient AR patients and one transient PsA patient were created via UI and deleted at the end of each Playwright run. The pytest module also creates 3 TEST_-prefixed patients and deletes them in the module-scoped autouse cleanup fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 backend regression suite is at /app/backend/tests/test_iter5_features.py — re-run with `pytest backend/tests/test_iter5_features.py -v`. The earlier suites at test_refactor_regression.py and test_pro_basdai_basfi_regression.py remain valid. For the Progetto Cuore numeric output (~17.9% expected for sex=M, age=55, SBP=145, TC=240, HDL=35, smoker=true), the form opens correctly and 4 numeric inputs are rendered, but full end-to-end input simulation was not executed because Progetto Cuore is a pure-frontend computation (calcProgettoCuore in /app/frontend/src/lib/clinimetrics.js) that doesn't hit any backend route — manual visual check by the main agent is sufficient. SpA flags persistence verified via UI reload. PZ-8277E1EE (admin org) has raProfile.ild=true so the ILD-screening clinical alert is correctly suppressed; to validate the POSITIVE path of ClinicalAlerts (alert visible), create a fresh AR patient with FR+/ACPA+ and raProfile.ild=false.
rca of the issue: N/A — no regression. All 6 features behave as specified.
